info.title: ZenithStore Online API
info.description: Complete REST API for managing users, customers, products, orders, payments, shipments, inventory, product reviews and questions in a professional e-commerce environment. Features JWT authentication, real-time WebSocket notifications, comprehensive order management workflow, MongoDB-powered review/Q&A system with moderation, and robust inventory tracking with full CRUD operations across all resources.

bearerAuth.description: JWT token obtained from login endpoint

success.description: Indicates if the operation was successful

message.description: Human readable message describing the result
Error message describing what went wrong

isBlocked.description: Whether the user is temporarily blocked
Whether the customer is temporarily blocked

availableToSell.description: Quantity available for new orders (available - safety stock)

createdBy.description: User ID who created the category

totalPrice.description: Total price for this item (unitPrice * quantity)

totalItems.description: Number of different products in the order

searchTerm.description: General search term for text fields

addedAt.description: Date when product was added to wishlist

isRead.description: Whether the notification has been read

isDelivered.description: Whether the notification has been delivered via WebSocket

get.description: Get system health status including database connection, WebSocket status, and memory usage
Get complete OpenAPI specification for this API
Access the HTML test interface for WebSocket events monitoring

schema.description: HTML page with WebSocket test interface

get.description: Get a list of all active technical users (admin function, localhost only)

post.description: Create a new technical user (admin function, localhost only)

409.description: User with this ID already exists

delete.description: Soft delete a technical user (admin function, localhost only)

parameters.name: searchTerm
parameters.description: Search in user ID, first name, last name (partial match)

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Filter users created after this date

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Filter users created before this date

post.description: Logout and blacklist current JWT token (localhost only, JWT required)
Force password reset for a user (admin function, localhost only)

Remove temporary block from a technical user (admin function, localhost only)

parameters.description: Search in customer name, email (partial match)

parameters.description: Filter customers created after this date

parameters.description: Filter customers created before this date

get.description: Get authenticated customer's profile information (JWT required)

delete.description: Soft delete the authenticated customer's account (JWT required)

get.description: Get a list of all active customers (admin function, localhost only)

post.description: Register a new customer account in the system

patch.description: Change customer password with current password verification. Requires email, current password and new password.

Authenticate a customer and receive a JWT token for API access

429.description: Too many login attempts - rate limited

post.description: Logout and blacklist current JWT token (JWT required)
Temporarily block a customer (admin function, localhost only)
Remove temporary block from a customer (admin function, localhost only)
Create a new order from frontend cart, validate stock availability, and reserve inventory. Customer JWT required.

400.description: Invalid request - empty cart or validation error

get.description: Retrieve complete order information including items and shipping details

post.summary: Add shipping address to RESERVED order
post.description: Add shipping address to a RESERVED order. Customer JWT required.

400.description: Order is not in RESERVED status

get.description: Advanced order search with multiple filters and pagination

parameters.name: searchTerm
parameters.description: Search in customer name, order ID (partial match)

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Filter orders created after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: Filter orders created before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: minAmount
parameters.description: Filter orders with total amount >= this value

parameters.name: maxAmount
parameters.description: Filter orders with total amount <= this value

patch.description: Move order from NEW status to PROCESSING, assigning it to a technical user (localhost only, JWT required)

managedBy.description: Technical user ID who will manage this order

400.description: Order is not in NEW status or invalid manager

post.description: Create a shipment for a PROCESSING order (localhost only, JWT required)

400.description: Order is not in PROCESSING status

patch.description: Mark the shipment as sent and update order status to SHIPPED (localhost only, JWT required)

shipmentDate.description: Actual shipping date (defaults to current time)

400.description: Order is not in SHIPPING status

post.description: Start payment process for a RESERVED order. Returns payment URL and session details.
Handle payment status updates from payment providers. Updates order status based on payment result.

get.description: Get all active products with current inventory levels (localhost only, JWT required)

parameters.name: lowStock
parameters.description: Show only products with low stock (below safety level)

value.name: Wireless Headphones
value.description: High-quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation

409.description: Product with this code already exists

get.description: Advanced product search with filters (public access, no authentication required)

parameters.name: searchTerm
parameters.description: Search in product code, name, description (partial match)

parameters.name: priceMin
parameters.description: Filter products with price >= this value

parameters.name: priceMax
parameters.description: Filter products with price <= this value

parameters.name: lowStock
parameters.description: Show only products with low stock

get.description: Get specific product details with inventory (public access, no authentication required)

patch.description: Update product details (name, description, price, category) - localhost only, JWT required

patch.description: Update available quantity and safety stock for a product (localhost only, JWT required)

get.description: Get all active categories ordered by display order (public access)

post.description: Create a new product category (admin only, JWT required)

isActive.description: Whether the category is active (1) or inactive (0)

get.description: Get detailed information about a specific category (public access)

patch.description: Update an existing category (admin only, JWT required)

delete.description: Soft delete a category by setting is_active to 0 (admin only, JWT required)

get.description: Get all products in a specific category with pagination and price filters (public access)

post.description: Restore a soft-deleted category by setting is_active to 1 (admin only, JWT required)

get.description: Get shipments with optional filtering by order ID or customer ID (JWT required - Customer sees only their shipments, Users see all or filtered)

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: Filter shipments by specific order ID

parameters.name: customerId
parameters.description: Filter shipments by specific customer ID (admin only)

post.description: Handle shipment status updates from shipping providers (public endpoint, no authentication required)

status.description: Updated shipment status (only these statuses can be sent from external providers)

400.description: Invalid webhook payload or tracking code not found

get.description: Get all products in the customer's wishlist with product details (Customer JWT required)

post.description: Add a product to the customer's wishlist (Customer JWT required)

400.description: Invalid product code or product not available

delete.description: Remove a product from the customer's wishlist (Customer JWT required)

get.description: Get notifications for authenticated customer with optional filters and pagination (Customer JWT required)
Get count of unread notifications for authenticated customer (Customer JWT required)

patch.description: Mark all notifications as read for authenticated customer (Customer JWT required)

200.description: All notifications marked as read successfully

count.description: Number of notifications marked as read

patch.description: Mark a specific notification as read (Customer JWT required)

post.description: Send a notification to all active customers (Admin only, localhost only)
Send a notification to customers with specific product in wishlist (Admin only, localhost only)

400.description: Invalid request body or product code

post.description: Create a new review for a purchased product. Customer must have ordered the product. Only one review per product per order allowed. (Customer JWT required)

orderId.description: Order ID where product was purchased (required)

403.description: Product not purchased or already reviewed

get.description: Get all approved reviews for a product (public endpoint)

patch.description: Approve a pending review (Admin only, localhost only)
Reject a review with reason (Admin only, localhost only)
Increment helpful counter for a review (public endpoint)

delete.description: Delete a review. Customers can only delete their own reviews, admins can delete any. (JWT required)

403.description: Not authorized to delete this review

get.description: Get all reviews awaiting moderation (Admin only, localhost only)
Get all reviews created by authenticated customer (Customer JWT required)

post.description: Ask a question about a product (Customer JWT required)

get.description: Get all non-hidden questions for a product (public endpoint)

patch.description: Add staff answer to a customer question (Admin only, localhost only)
Hide a question from public view (Admin only, localhost only)
Increment helpful counter for a question (public endpoint)

delete.description: Delete a question. Customers can only delete their own questions, admins can delete any. (JWT required)

403.description: Not authorized to delete this question

get.description: Get all unanswered questions (Admin only, localhost only)
Get all questions created by authenticated customer (Customer JWT required)

tags.name: System
tags.description: System health, documentation and utility endpoints

tags.name: Users
tags.description: Technical user management and authentication (admin functions, localhost only)

tags.name: Customers
tags.description: Customer registration, authentication and profile management

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Product catalog management with inventory tracking and search capabilities

tags.name: Categories
tags.description: Product category management with public listing and admin CRUD operations

tags.name: Orders
tags.description: Complete order lifecycle management from cart creation to delivery with real-time status updates

tags.name: Payments
tags.description: Payment processing integration with external providers and webhook handling

tags.name: Shipments
tags.description: Shipping management, carrier integration and delivery tracking with webhook updates

tags.name: Wishlist
tags.description: Customer wishlist management for saving favorite products

tags.name: Notifications
tags.description: Customer notification system with WebSocket real-time delivery and MongoDB storage

tags.name: Reviews
tags.description: Product review system with moderation workflow, customer ratings and helpful voting (MongoDB)

tags.name: Questions
tags.description: Product Q&A system with staff answers, moderation and helpful voting (MongoDB)

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Administrative functions for broadcast notifications and system management (localhost only)

x-features.authentication: JWT-based authentication with role-based access control
x-features.realtime: WebSocket notifications for order status updates
x-features.inventory: Real-time inventory tracking with reservation system
x-features.workflow: Complete order workflow from cart to delivery
x-features.security: CORS, Helmet, rate limiting, domain restrictions
x-features.mongodb: Hybrid database architecture with MongoDB for reviews, questions and activity logs
x-features.moderation: Review and question moderation system with approval workflow

order.paid.description: Emitted to all technical users when an order payment is completed

order.processing.description: Emitted to the specific technical user who took charge of an order

order.sent.description: Emitted to the technical user when order is handed to shipping carrier

order.shipping.description: Emitted to technical user when shipment status is updated by carrier

order.delivered.description: Emitted to technical user when order is successfully delivered
